description:
You are the Migration Lead coordinating a live platform cutover from on-premise infrastructure to cloud (Project Atlas). Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!).

Tonight's maintenance window is 2026-03-18 01:00-05:00 UTC. Five teams have posted pre-cutover readiness updates in their channels. Two monitoring alerts have appeared in #ops-alerts. Your job:

1. Review all team readiness updates in #atlas-database, #atlas-networking, #atlas-backend, #atlas-frontend, and #atlas-qa. Identify blockers or conditional statuses.
2. Create a private channel 'atlas-cutover-war-room' (topic: "Project Atlas | Cutover 2026-03-18 01:00-05:00 UTC | Status: IN PROGRESS") and invite the five team leads (db.lead, network.lead, backend.lead, frontend.lead, qa.lead) plus sre.oncall and cloud.architect.
3. Post and pin a consolidated cutover runbook with the correct staged migration order and rollback triggers based on what teams reported.
4. Post a go/no-go status tracker reflecting each team's actual readiness.
5. Reply to both monitoring alerts in #ops-alerts with triage assessments.
6. DM the team lead whose status is CONDITIONAL requesting an ETA, and brief vp.engineering with an executive status summary.
7. Post a cutover-commencement announcement in #engineering-announcements.
